messages.content:
Derive interfaces for each child.

Parent: DataPipeline
Purpose: ETL data processing: ingest, transform, validate, export.

Parent inputs: input: Any - JSON with action (ingest/transform/validate/export), source
Parent outputs: output: Any - JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data

Available Data Stores:
  - raw_data (memory, read_write)
  - processed_data (memory, read_write)

Children (frozen from Stage 1):
  IngestData: Read raw data from source and store in raw_data store
    behavior: Reads input source, parses data, writes to raw_data store, logs ingestion
    role: execute
  TransformData: Apply transformations to raw data and store in processed_data
    behavior: Reads raw_data, applies transformation rules, writes to processed_data, logs transformation
    role: execute
  ValidateData: Check quality of processed data and mark invalid records
    behavior: Reads processed_data, applies validation rules, marks invalid records, logs validation
    role: validate
  ExportData: Export only valid records from processed_data to output
    behavior: Reads processed_data, filters valid records, formats output, logs export
    role: execute

Return ONLY the JSON response.
